steps.title: Set the factors to zero
steps.content:
The constant factor $48$ does not affect the solutions, so use the two variable factors.
$$x^3+125=0$$
$$x^4-16=0$$

steps.title: Count the real solutions
steps.content:
The first equation gives $x=-5$. The second gives
$$x^4=16$$
so the real solutions are $x=2$ and $x=-2$. There are $3$ distinct real solutions. The answer is B.
